# ⚡ Quick Reference Card

## 🔥 Most Used (Learn These First)

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `Cmd+K` `Cmd+N` | 🚀 **New Project** |
| `Cmd+J` | 💻 **Toggle Terminal** |
| `Cmd+P` | 🔍 **Quick Open File** |
| `Cmd+Shift+P` | 🎮 **Command Palette** |
| `Cmd+Shift+R` | ▶️ **Run Python File** |

## 📂 Sidebar Views

| `Cmd+1` | 📁 Explorer |
| `Cmd+2` | 🔍 Search |
| `Cmd+3` | 🔀 Git |
| `Cmd+4` | 🐛 Debug |
| `Cmd+5` | 🧩 Extensions |

## 🛠️ Quick Tasks

All use `Cmd+K` then second key:

- `Cmd+K` `Cmd+S` - 📊 Code Stats
- `Cmd+K` `Cmd+B` - 💾 Backup
- `Cmd+K` `Cmd+C` - 🧹 Clean Caches
- `Cmd+K` `Cmd+T` - 🔍 Find TODOs

## 🐍 Python

- `Cmd+Shift+R` - Run file
- `Cmd+K` `Cmd+V` - Create venv
- `Cmd+K` `Cmd+I` - Install requirements

## 🎮 Godot (in .gd files)

- `Cmd+Shift+G` - Open in Godot
- `Cmd+Shift+F5` - Run game

## 💻 Terminal

- `Cmd+J` - Toggle
- `Ctrl+Shift+T` - New terminal
- `Ctrl+Shift+C` - Clear

## ✏️ Editing

- `Cmd+D` - Select next match
- `Alt+Up/Down` - Move line
- `Cmd+K` `Cmd+F` - Format

## 🔀 Git

- `Cmd+K` `Cmd+G` - Open Git view
- `Cmd+K` `Cmd+P` - Push
- `Cmd+K` `Cmd+L` - Pull

---

📖 **Full Guide:** [KEYBOARD-SHORTCUTS.md](KEYBOARD-SHORTCUTS.md)
